member.name: T:NModbus.Transport.IP.BackchannelTcpClientTransport
member.summary: This is used to communicate to a connected Modbus TCP client. This is only used internally by a Modbus Server.

member.name: T:NModbus.Transport.IP.IConnectionStrategy
member.summary: Represents a methodology of creating and or maintaining TCP Client connections.

member.name: M:NModbus.Transport.IP.IConnectionStrategy.GetStreamContainer(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets an object (that references a TcpClient) that has a lifetime of a single request and optionally a response.

member.name: T:NModbus.Transport.IP.IPerRequestStreamContainer
member.summary: This container will exist for the lifetime of a single TCP request and optional response.

member.name: F:NModbus.Transport.IP.Mbap.MbapSerializer.MbapHeaderLength
member.summary: The length of a MBAP header.

member.name: T:NModbus.Transport.IP.ModbusIPPorts
member.summary: Default ports for Modbus over TCP.

member.name: T:NModbus.Transport.IP.ModbusServerTcpConnection
member.summary: This represents a connection from a client on a server.

member.name: M:NModbus.Transport.IP.ModbusServerTcpConnection.IntializeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.remarks: This is broken out because we can't do async in the constructor, and we want to report errors back to the caller.

member.name: M:NModbus.Transport.IP.ModbusTcpServerNetworkTransport.#ctor(System.Net.Sockets.TcpListener,NModbus.Interfaces.IModbusServerNetwork,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory,System.Net.Security.SslServerAuthenticationOptions)
member.param: A configured that will listen for incoming connections.
Specify a value to enable Tls (Modbus Security Spec).

member.name: M:NModbus.Transport.IP.TcpStreamFactory.#ctor(System.Net.IPEndPoint,System.Action{System.Net.Sockets.TcpClient},System.Net.Security.SslClientAuthenticationOptions)
member.param: If non-null, an ssl connection will be created with the specified options.

member.name: M:NModbus.Transport.IP.TcpStreamFactory.CreateAndConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a connection and performs a connection.
member.remarks: Optionally creates an if an instance is provided in the constructor.
